steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The passage says the fossil can “reveal important details about the time in which KNM-KP 271 lived.” This shows the fossil helps clarify or illuminate the Pliocene epoch.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: “Illuminate” means to shed light on or clarify — precisely what revealing important details about a time period requires. Imitate, design, and substitute don't fit this meaning. This matches choice C — C is correct.
